title: Mexican Crispy Chicken Drumsticks
description: Crispy fried chicken drumsticks smothered in a spicy Mexican sauce, inspired by traditional dishes.
instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, fajita seasoning, and hot sauce.
2. In a separate dish, beat eggs and mix with milk.
3. Dip each drumstick into the flour mixture, then the eggs, and finally coat in french bread crumbs.
4. Heat 1/2 cup of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
5. Fry the coated drumsticks until golden brown and crispy, about 5-7 minutes.
6. Remove the drumsticks from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
7. In a separate saucepan, heat 1/4 cup of hot sauce over low heat.
8. Add 1/4 cup of sour cream to the hot sauce and stir until smooth.
9. Serve the crispy chicken drumsticks with the spicy sauce for dipping.
10. Garnish with chopped cilantro or scallions if desired.
